features.name: register with self-assignment in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a register with a self-assignment (r <= r) inside an always @(posedge clock) block
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] r;
always @(posedge clock) r <= r;

features.name: register with conditional self-reference via mux
features.description: Code should include a register assigned with a mux where one branch is the register itself, creating a conditional self-assignment pattern
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] r;
always @(posedge clock) r <= cond ? a : r;
